title: IISER Tirupati Faculty Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 35 Professor and Assistant Professor Posts
org: Indian Institute of Science Education and Research Tirupati (IISER Tirupati)
shortInfo: Indian Institute of Science Education and Research Tirupati (IISER Tirupati) Professor and Assistant Professor Notification 2026 has been released on 13 April 2026 on the official website of IISER Tirupati. A total of 35 vacancies have been announced through the IISER Tirupati Professor and Assistant Professor Recruitment 2026.

basic_details.job_title: IISER Tirupati Faculty Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 35 Professor and Assistant Professor Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Science Education and Research Tirupati (IISER Tirupati)
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Science Education and Research Tirupati (IISER Tirupati) Professor and Assistant Professor Notification 2026 has been released on 13 April 2026 on the official website of IISER Tirupati. A total of 35 vacancies have been announced through the IISER Tirupati Professor and Assistant Professor Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: Ph.D. with first class in the preceding degree
qualification.details: Professor: PhD with a first class in the preceding degree, with very good academic record throughout in addition to proven track record of outstanding research ability and proven leadership skills. Minimum of ten years of relevant post-PhD research and teaching experience from India (or) abroad, of which, at least four years have to be at the level of Associate Professor [Level 13 A2] from Institutes of Eminence / Institutes of National Importance like IITs, IISc Bangalore, IIMs, Central Universities, reputed State Universities, National level Research Institutes / Laboratories etc. Assistant Professor: PhD with a first class in the preceding degree with very good academic record. At least three years of relevant post-PhD experience in teaching / research / industry.

selection_process: Online Application Shortlisting Interview / Presentation Document Verification
how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 28-05-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IISER Tirupati to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for IISER Tirupati Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your online application for the Professor and Assistant Professor posts is 28th May 2026. Ensure you complete the application process before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for Professor and Assistant Professor posts?
faq.answer: There are a total of 35 vacancies announced for the Professor and Assistant Professor positions at IISER Tirupati for the year 2026 recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q3. What is the minimum qualification required for these posts?
faq.answer: The minimum qualification required is a Ph.D. with first class in the preceding degree, along with specific experience requirements for each post as detailed in the official notification.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for Professor and Assistant Professor roles?
faq.answer: The salary for Assistant Professor starts at an entry pay of ₹.1,01,500/- (Academic Pay Level-12), and for Professor, it starts at an entry pay of ₹. 1,59,100/- (Academic Pay Level-14A).

faq.question: Q5. What is the application mode for IISER Tirupati Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is strictly online. Candidates need to visit the official website or use the provided link to submit their applications.

faq.question: Q6. Are there any application fees for this recruitment?
faq.answer: As per the available information, no specific application fee has been mentioned in the official notification for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q7. Where can I find the official notification PDF?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be downloaded from the 'Important Links' section of this article. It contains all the detailed information regarding the recruitment.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for the IISER Tirupati posts?
faq.answer: The selection process typically involves online application, shortlisting of candidates, followed by an interview or presentation, and finally document verification.

faq.question: Q9. Does IISER Tirupati recruit for government jobs?
faq.answer: Yes, IISER Tirupati is an autonomous institution established by the Ministry of Education, Government of India, and its recruitments are considered government jobs.

faq.question: Q10. What is the location of IISER Tirupati?
faq.answer: IISER Tirupati is located in Tirupati, Andhra Pradesh, with the pincode 517619.
